# Aegis agent entry (GitHub Copilot)

Canonical install for this repo is at the **repository root**:

| Piece | Path |
| --- | --- |
| Protocol (fused Aegis + OpenSpec) | [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) |
| OKF brain | [`_okf_knowledge/`](../../_okf_knowledge/) |
| Copilot DNA stub | [`aegis.agent.md`](aegis.agent.md) |
| OpenSpec | [`openspec/`](../../openspec/) |
| Binding pointer | [`../aegis-openspec.md`](../aegis-openspec.md) |

Do **not** keep a second `_okf_knowledge/` under `.github/agents/`.
